creator: tatsuki_makino@hotmail.com
text:
(In reply to Emanuel Haupt from comment #2)

> Can you show me how I can reproduce this?

This problem occurs when the window is in its screenshot state.
However, if the window manager is compositing window manager, the problem of drawing window contents does not seem to occur.
If a window manager such as compiz or xcompmgr is running, this problem does not occur.
To be precise, there is no problem even if redrawing does not take place because information is not lost where other windows overlap.

There may be other problems, such as the [X] button to close the window not working when that message box is displayed.
The patch does not correct that much.
